idea-plugin.name: Flutter Widget Wrapper
idea-plugin.description:
Add context-aware Flutter widget wrappers to the Alt+Enter intention menu. Wrap widgets without manually moving code, fixing indentation, or rebuilding constructors.
Includes built-in wrappers such as Align, AnimatedSize, Flexible, GestureDetector, InkWell, Opacity, Positioned, SafeArea, SingleChildScrollView, and Stack. Wrappers are shown only where they are valid; for example, Flexible is offered only for direct children of Row, Column, or Flex, and Positioned only for direct children of Stack. You can also wrap several sibling widgets in a Flex children list with a Stack.
Enable or disable built-in wrappers, create custom wrappers with validation and preview, and import or export wrapper definitions as JSON. You can also turn an existing Flutter widget into a reusable custom wrapper.
